name: Dropdown Select
summary: Dropdown menu for selecting from a predefined list using `enum` in the data schema
whenToUse: Selecting one option from a list of 4+ predefined choices
Province/state selection, categories, or any fixed list of values
notes: Define the options in `enum` array on the data schema property — renders as a dropdown by default
For 3 or fewer options, consider using radio buttons instead for better UX
The label on the UI schema overrides the auto-generated label from the property name
For dynamic lists loaded from an API or configuration, use data registers instead of enum
